title: Viscous CTM
description: Connected textures for slime and honey
body:
This pack makes slime and honey _stick_ better visually by connecting their inside element to their neighbors.

REQUIRES A CTM MOD LIKE [CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

May not work well with Optifine, Sodium+Continuity is recommended instead.

The pack includes PBR maps as well:
![PBR Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb58c104de8eefd32b55adbd77957a61a184e89e.jpeg)
